title: crataegus quaesita var. egens
intro: Crataegus quaesita var. egens, also known as the dwarf hawthorn, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Crataegus quaesita var. egens include its antispasmodic, astringent, and diuretic properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Crataegus quaesita var. egens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
